name: k10
description: UniHiker K10 (ESP32-S3) development — hardware API, firmware deployment, recovery, REPL probing, and gallery server

skills.name: k10
skills.description: UniHiker K10 hardware API reference, boot order, hard-fault traps, and project status. Use as the default entry point for any K10 work.

skills.name: k10-recover
skills.description: Recover a bricked/hung/corrupt-FS K10 via esptool erase + reflash + filesystem reformat. Use when serial writes time out or device is unresponsive.

skills.name: k10-deploy
skills.description: Deploy firmware to a healthy K10 via mpremote. Covers boot guard timing, config patching per CAM_ID, and verification.

skills.name: k10-flash
skills.description: Full flash from blank — esptool erase + write firmware + reformat FS + deploy booth code. The complete sequence for a new or fully bricked device.

skills.name: k10-probe
skills.description: Connect to K10 REPL interactively — serial connection, paste mode execution, testing APIs, reading attributes. Use when experimenting with hardware.

skills.name: k10-server
skills.description: Gallery server setup — FastAPI + RGB565 decode + WebSocket live gallery. Includes macOS-specific notes and dependency install.
